plan.title: Plan
plan.body:
## Phase

Meta

## Motivation

Coordinate development work across multiple phases using deterministic, scout-gated execution where each phase begins with a dev scout PR that establishes stable seams before feature work can begin. This ensures phases integrate without conflicts and features complete before phase PRs merge to the default branch.

## Canonical docs

- `docs/prd.md`

## Features

**Planned phases and scouts:**
- (complete) E2E Hardening (#176 scout, branch: phase/e2e-hardening)
- (pending) Arbitration & Simulation (#188 scout, branch: phase/arbitration-simulation)
- (pending) Demo Polish (#200 scout, branch: phase/demo-polish)
- (pending) Web App UX (#201 scout, branch: phase/webapp-ux)

**Execution rules:**
- Feature PRs target phase/* branches; phase PRs target main
- No non-scout issue in a phase may begin until its scout PR merges
- Phases are serialized or parallelizable as indicated in the phase metadata
- Heavy test policy on phase PRs; fast on feature PRs

**Current phase status:**
- (complete) E2E Hardening phase complete (#176, #175, #156, #162 closed)
- (pending) Arbitration & Simulation phase in progress (#188, #186, #187 closed; #199 UI remaining)
- (pending) Demo Polish phase queued
- (pending) Web App UX phase queued

## Test Plan

- (pending) All phase scouts establish stable seams and merge without integration issues
- (pending) Phase features integrate with no cross-phase merge conflicts
- (pending) All E2E tests pass in the default branch after each phase PR merge
- (pending) Scout PRs pass heavy test policy; feature PRs pass fast test policy

---

## Detailed Phase Structure

### Phase: E2E Hardening

Goal: Strengthen the E2E test harness by gating story tests on browser console errors, then add full Finance Admin and Producer role story coverage to the suite.
Parallelizable: yes
Branch: phase/e2e-hardening
Depends on phases: None.
Scout gate: #176
Phase PR: phase/e2e-hardening → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #176 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: verify E2E harness console error gate and story test seams [risk: 2]

**Parallel group: console-gate-and-producer-e2e**
- #175 - test(e2e): add console error gate — fail story tests on browser console errors and suppress log noise [risk: 2]
- #156 - test: E2E browser tests — Producer user stories (PR-1 through PR-4) [risk: 3]
- #162 - test: E2E browser tests — Finance Admin user stories (FA-1 through FA-5) [risk: 4]

### Phase: Arbitration & Simulation

Goal: Implement dispute arbitration recommendations (Finance/Manager) and producer deal simulation (Producer), both powered by Claude API reasoning over commission logic.
Parallelizable: yes
Branch: phase/arbitration-simulation
Depends on phases: E2E Hardening
Scout gate: #188
Phase PR: phase/arbitration-simulation → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #188 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: Arbitration & Simulation worker infrastructure and Claude API integration [risk: 3]

**Parallel group: arbitration-and-simulation**
- #186 - feat: Dispute Arbitration Engine — AI-driven payout recommendations [risk: 3]
- #187 - feat: Producer Deal Simulation — payout + dispute-risk forecasting [risk: 3]
- #199 - feat: webapp — add UI surfaces for AI dispute arbitration and deal simulation [risk: 4]

### Phase: Demo Polish

Goal: Populate the demo seed with heterogeneous commission examples across fee structures, tiers, and incentive types.
Parallelizable: no
Serialization reason: Single-issue phase — only #196 (demo seed) lives here.
Branch: phase/demo-polish
Depends on phases: None.
Scout gate: #200
Phase PR: phase/demo-polish → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #200 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: Demo Polish phase branch and seed data seam [risk: 1]
- #196 - feat: demo seed — heterogeneous commission examples for producer account [risk: 2]

### Phase: Web App UX

Goal: Clean up role-based nav surfaces and add inclusive product documentation accessible to all authenticated roles.
Parallelizable: no
Serialization reason: #198 (nav cleanup) and #197 (product docs) both modify apps/web/src/lib/roleRoutes.ts — serialized to avoid merge conflicts.
Branch: phase/webapp-ux
Depends on phases: None.
Scout gate: #201
Phase PR: phase/webapp-ux → main
Test policy: fast on feature PRs, heavy on phase PR

- #201 - [dev-scout] dev-scout: Web App UX phase branch and routing seam [risk: 1]
- #198 - fix: webapp — remove irrelevant nav surfaces from Manager and FinanceAdmin roles [risk: 2]
- #197 - feat: webapp — inclusive product documentation accessible to all roles [risk: 3]

## Phase: Web App UX

- #203 - feat: webapp — UX overhaul: entity pickers, design-system pass, NavShell rebuild

## Phase: Unplaced

plan_entries.title: [dev-scout] dev-scout: verify E2E harness console error gate and story test seams
test(e2e): add console error gate — fail story tests on browser console errors and suppress log noise
test: E2E browser tests — Producer user stories (PR-1 through PR-4)
test: E2E browser tests — Finance Admin user stories (FA-1 through FA-5)
[dev-scout] dev-scout: Arbitration & Simulation worker infrastructure and Claude API integration
feat: Dispute Arbitration Engine — AI-driven payout recommendations
feat: Producer Deal Simulation — payout + dispute-risk forecasting
feat: webapp — add UI surfaces for AI dispute arbitration and deal simulation
[dev-scout] dev-scout: Demo Polish phase branch and seed data seam
feat: demo seed — heterogeneous commission examples for producer account
[dev-scout] dev-scout: Web App UX phase branch and routing seam
fix: webapp — remove irrelevant nav surfaces from Manager and FinanceAdmin roles
feat: webapp — inclusive product documentation accessible to all roles
feat: webapp — UX overhaul: entity pickers, design-system pass, NavShell rebuild
public_contracts: New GET /commission-runs list endpoint (id, status, created_at, placement count) for the run picker — today only GET /commission-runs/:id/* exists
GET /analytics/executive profitability rows gain a client display-name field alongside the client id
packages/ui exports a token layer (colors, spacing, container width), Button variants (primary/secondary/destructive), and a StatusChip component with a semantic status→variant mapping
roleRoutes.ts route map gains prefix/child-route semantics (a parent path permits and highlights its detail routes); consumed by NavShell, the Forbidden guard, and post-login redirect
shared_state: roleRoutes.ts is the single source of truth for landing, permitted paths, and nav items per role; this feature changes its matching semantics but must not move gating into components
App.tsx route table changes from stacked component lists to one composed page component per route
useSession.ts /me probe and its console output (the 401 signed-out path must stay silent)
config_effects: eslint no-console rule enabled for apps/web/src (warn-free build required by lint gate)
test_surfaces: bun --bun vitest run tests/component (NavShell, picker, StatusChip, page-composition tests)
bun run test:browser (story suites under the #175 console-error gate)
bun run typecheck && bun run lint

coupling_risks.risk: #197 (docs nav item) and #198 (remove leaked nav surfaces) both modify roleRoutes.ts in the same phase
coupling_risks.mitigation: Phase is already serialized for this reason; this issue depends on #197 and #198 and lands last in the phase

coupling_risks.risk: Story tests fail on pre-auth 401 console noise if the gate lands before the session-probe fix
coupling_risks.mitigation: This issue includes the probe fix; its browser story asserts zero console errors on the login page

coupling_risks.surface: Detail routes for arbitration/simulation UI (#199, Arbitration & Simulation phase)
coupling_risks.risk: #199 needs child routes like /disputes/:id which today's exact-match routing cannot express
coupling_risks.mitigation: Prefix/child-route matching introduced here is a prerequisite capability, not a conflict; no shared files with #199 beyond roleRoutes.ts entries

plan_entries.title: docs: architecture.md stale — all six role surfaces shipped, not just producer portal
test_surfaces: grep -n 'producer portal plus the login surface' docs/architecture.md (must no longer assert it is the only shipped surface)
ls apps/web/src/components/{finance,manager,executive,hr,partner,portal} (confirms the six shipped surfaces the doc must describe)

plan_entries.title: docs: architecture.md package layout claims six packages but only core/db/ui exist
test_surfaces: ls packages/ (confirms only core, db, ui exist — no auth/data/services/integrations)
grep -n 'packages/{core,ui,auth,data,services,integrations}' docs/architecture.md (untagged claim must be tagged (planned) or corrected)

plan_entries.title: docs: code back-links cite wrong PRD section numbers (5.8 mislabeled, phantom 7.6)
test_surfaces: grep -rn section-number PRD back-links across apps/ and packages/

plan_entries.title: docs: PRD describes no AI dispute arbitration or producer deal simulation despite a whole shipped phase
